title: Private Link for account-level resources (Beta) ​
body:
**July 6, 2026**

You can now use Private Link to privately connect to Databricks account-level resources, such as the account console, through a VPC interface endpoint instead of the public internet. See [Configure inbound Private Link for account-level resources](/aws/en/security/network/front-end/front-end-private-connect-account).
